mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, password, role, building, room, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id as userId, password, role, building, room, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND password = #{password}
SELECT id, user_id as userId, password, role, building, room, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM users
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, password, role, building, room) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{role}, #{building}, #{room})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET building = #{building}, room = #{room} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
